LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT EINSTEIN NOAH RESTAURANT GROUP, INC.'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND STAY LITIGATION IS CONTINUED TO JANUARY 24, 2014 TO GIVE MOVING PARTY THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. ANY EXHIBIT MUST BE SEPARATED BY AN EXHIBIT TAB PER CRC 3.1110(F). THE COURT HAS COPIES OF THE OPPOSITION AND REPLY PAPERS. JUDGE: MARLA J. The Court has received proposed order submitted by counsel via email. Judge: Ernest Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR5976
*AFTER HEARING, THE COURT SIGNS 1) ORDER DENYING DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND STAY LITIGATION AND 2) ORDER RE: DEFENDANT'S EVIDENTIARY OBJECTIONS TO DECLARATION OF BUTHINA RASHID*

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Litigation
Off Calendar Dec-19-2013 Continued To Jan-24-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court MODIFIED its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT EINSTEIN NOAH RESTAURANT GROUP, INC.'S Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Litigation IS
Continued to JANUARY 24, 2014 to give moving party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Moving party must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than December 19, 2013 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be denied. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). The Court has copies of the opposition and reply papers. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Court Reporter: Tony Vaughn, CSR #6185
